title: Judiciary has failed to live up to people's expectations: Former Supreme Court Justice AS Oka
description: Former Supreme Court Justice AS Oka on Monday said the Indian judiciary has not been able to live up to what citizens expected of it under the Constitution.He said that the system’s self‑praise often overlooks how ordinary litigants actually experience courts.“The common man, the citizens of India had great expectations from this legal system, but somehow all those expectations could not be fulfilled by our judiciary,” he said.
